title: uDdePoke
text: uDdePoke Modifies a data item in a DDE server application that supports its use. Parameters in: $50 Service name $51 Topic name $52 Item name $53 Data item out: $status 0 =success, -1 =failure Description Note: The maximum number of bytes sent by uDdePoke is set by UGETREGC . Currently, this is 7999 bytes. The detail trigger of a command button pokes data from fields on the form into OpenOffice Calc: trigger detail $50="Calc" $51="wrksht.ods" $52="R1C1" $53=field.entity activate "udde".uDdePoke() if ($status=0) message "Poke succeeded" else message "Request did not succeed" endif end Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
